name: AEV-PLIG
description: Predicts binding affinity of protein-ligand complexes from 3D structure. GNN-based scoring function competitive with FEP calculations. 400,000x faster than free energy perturbation methods.
capabilities: Predicts binding affinity of protein-ligand complexes from 3D structure
GNN-based scoring function competitive with FEP calculations
400,000x faster than free energy perturbation methods

complex_structure.description: Protein-ligand complex structure in PDB format containing both receptor and ligand

ligand_chain_id.description: Chain ID or residue name identifying the ligand in the complex
